title: 151 Double Sided Foam Tape, 3 Rolls, 18Mm X 2.6M, White
features: STRONG, RELIABLE SECURE BONDING: 151 Double Sided Foam Tape, apply a reliable bond to a wide variety of surfaces inlcuding wood, metals and plastics.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying 151 Double Sided Foam Tape.

PERFECT FOR CRAFTING: 151 Double Sided Foam Tape, versatile tape suitable for a wide range of crafting projects! Securely mount your creative projects, attach embellishments to add 3D elements to wall art.
TRIPLE TAPE PACK: 151 Double Sided Foam Tape, supplied as a pack of 3 rolls. Each roll is 18mm x 2.6m, foam thickness of 1.25mm
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use, triple pack 151 foam tape. Store at room temperature
